title: Hybrid Developer
description: Full-Stack Software Developer with hands-on experience across mobile, web, and backend development, specializing in cloud infrastructure management and migration. Delivered end-to-end solutions using Flutter, Node.js, and React/Next.js while leading a critical live application migration from AWS to Azure, ensuring continuity and scalability on Microsoft's cloud ecosystem.
responsibilities: Played a key role in cloud infrastructure migration from AWS to Azure, transitioning Cognito → Azure External Entra, Lambda → Azure Functions, API Gateway → Azure API Management, and RDS → Azure Database.

Architected and implemented a real-time chat feature using WebSockets, owning both the Flutter frontend integration and Node.js backend, enabling seamless buyer-seller communication within the platform.
Implemented a Visitor Management System (VMS) to streamline company visitor tracking, access management, and operational oversight within the shipping application.
Developed a Talent Acquisition Portal for a maritime company, digitalizing a paper-based hiring process into a seamless digital workflow using Next.js
Built a candidate submission portal handling 15+ structured forms, streamlining the end-to-end candidate application and data collection process.
Developed an Admin Dashboard with hiring pipeline tracking and application status management, enabling HR teams to monitor and manage candidates across multiple hiring stages.
Built a Wellness Module enabling crew members to report health issues via a forum-based chat system, with real-time response capability for doctors through the admin portal.
Developed a Communicator Module facilitating structured crew communication around ship joining processes and operational issues, improving internal coordination for maritime teams.

Led UI revamps and codebase architectural overhauls across multiple projects, implementing modularization, separation of UI and business logic, and BLoC state management to improve scalability and team-wide consistency.
Onboarded onto a third-party Flutter codebase for a maritime industry application, independently understanding and extending an unfamiliar production codebase to deliver new features.
Developed and maintained a cross-platform rental marketplace application with distinct Admin (Web) and Buyer (Mobile) interfaces across the full Flutter mobile client

title: Software Developer
description: Full-Stack Software Developer with expertise in cross-platform mobile development, web application engineering, and backend systems. Responsible for building and maintaining Flutter mobile apps, React/Next.js web frontends, and Node.js backend services, while contributing to database architecture using MongoDB and cloud infrastructure deployments on AWS.
responsibilities: Built a Course Management Module enabling instructors to create structured courses with nested module hierarchies, forming the content backbone of the Learning Management System (LMS).

Developed a comprehensive Assessment Module for the LMS supporting multiple question types (single-select, multi-select, and text-based answers), automated scoring, admin-controlled grading for subjective answers, and downloadable certificates.
Integrated Razorpay and HDFC Payment Gateways into an e-commerce platform, handling end-to-end payment flow including order initiation, transaction management, and payment confirmation.
Built core e-commerce modules including Product Management, Cart, Order Management, and Search with category and price-based filtering.
Involved in AWS deployments using ECR, ECS, and S3, gaining hands-on experience with containerized application deployment and cloud infrastructure management.
Worked across Flutter, React.js, Next.js, and Node.js in a 15-20 person engineering team, developing strong foundations in full-stack development and cross-platform application architecture.
